faqs.question: How long do refunds take?
faqs.answer: Refunds process within 5-10 business days to your original payment method.

faqs.question: Can I get a refund after 30 days?
faqs.answer: Standard refund window is 30 days for annual, 14 days for monthly. Contact support for exceptions.

faqs.question: How are partial refunds calculated?
faqs.answer: Partial refunds are pro-rated: (unused_days / total_days) * amount_paid.
